description: Observational scenario for the AI self-targeting fix. P1 Shield-Captain and P2 Boyz are in engagement range. Loads the fixture, transitions to Fight, lets the AI execute its fight-phase decisions, and captures two screenshots: one as the phase opens and one after the AI's decisions land. The visual goldens prove no self-targeting occurred (no friendly attacks rendered). The phase assertion fires immediately after transition_to_phase so AI hasn't yet had a chance to race it forward.
